case_title: PONTAR REAL ESTATE MANAGEMENT COMPANY VS. LOUIS RIOFRIO et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF PONTAR REAL ESTATE MANAGEMENT COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT RIOFRIO, LOUIS

APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT RIOFRIO, LOUIS HEARING SET FOR JUN-19-2013 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT RIOFRIO, LOUIS
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT RIOFRIO, LOUIS
DECLARATION OF JONATHAN BORNSTEIN RE: UNAVAILABILITY OF ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF PONTAR REAL ESTATE MANAGEMENT COMPANY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PONTAR REAL ESTATE MANAGEMENT COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RIOFRIO, LOUIS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 825 BUSH STREET, APT. 303, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94108 COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO., *JUDGMENT ALSO APPLIES TO ALL UNKNOWN/UNNAMED OCCUPANTS.**

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JUN-19-2013 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT LOUIS RIOFRIO'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PONTAR REAL ESTATE MANAGEMENT COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT RIOFRIO, LOUIS
